name: Boys & Girls Club of Washington County
description: Boys & Girls Club of Washington County is a place to play pickleball in Brenham, TX. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Amenities include restrooms and water. A membership is required to play.

name: Burton Elementary School
description: Burton Elementary School is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Burton, TX. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms.

name: Early Learning Childhood Center (ECLC)
description: Come play pickleball at Early Learning Childhood Center (ECLC) in Brenham, TX! There is 1 indoor wood court. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility. A membership is required to play.

name: Jackson Street Park
description:
Public Park
Hours 5:00am - 11:00pm

Brenham Pickleball Club Reserved Hours:
Sunday, Tuesday, and Thursday evenings for 2 hours. Times vary with the seasons.

Coming fall 2025: 4 new added courts

name: St Paul's Lutheran Church
description: Come play pickleball at St Paul's Lutheran Church in Brenham, TX! There is 1 indoor wood court. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The court is private.
